name: Chromatic Open Source Sponsorship
description: Free visual testing plan for qualifying open source projects, built by the Storybook team. Includes 35,000 Chrome snapshots per month with cross-browser testing across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.

perks.title: Free Visual Testing
perks.description: 35,000 Chrome snapshots per month at no cost for qualifying open source projects.

perks.title: Cross-Browser Testing
perks.description: Automated visual regression testing across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge running in parallel.

perks.title: TurboSnap
perks.description: Reduce snapshot usage by up to 80% by only testing components that actually changed.

eligibility: Community-led projects with over 10,000 GitHub stars, 40,000 weekly npm downloads, or 100+ contributors.
Company-built UI libraries or design systems with 5+ contributors.
Government UI libraries or design systems (national-level or higher) with 5+ contributors.
applicationProcess: Apply through the Chromatic open source sponsorship page.
Chromatic reviews the application against their eligibility criteria.
